overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a scenic canyon river environment on an alien world. The character walks through shallow water between red rock formations, climbs a vegetated bank, and reaches a cliff edge overlooking a massive waterfall and distant canyon. A large pink planet is visible in the sky throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river canyon with red rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow river water between towering red canyon walls

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall reddish-brown cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
clear shallow water covering the canyon floor with visible rocks beneath
massive pinkish planet visible in the sky above the canyon
tall rock formation rising above the canyon in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow river in a wide canyon, flanked by towering red rock walls. The water is clear and reflective, and a large pink planet hangs in the partly cloudy sky above the distant rock spires.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetated canyon bank with dense alien bushes

events.description: character climbs up from the river water onto the vegetated canyon bank

agents.ego_description: climbing up the river bank and pushing through dense vegetation along a dirt path

entered.detail: thick alien shrubbery lining the path with broad green leaves
reddish dirt trail winding through the vegetation
spiky succulent plants with bright red flower spikes

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, climbing onto a vegetated bank covered in dense alien bushes and aloe plants. The path continues through thick greenery while the canyon walls recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking waterfall and canyon vista

events.description: character reaches cliff edge revealing expansive view of waterfall and canyon below

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the cliff edge while observing the waterfall and distant canyon landscape

entered.detail: massive waterfall cascading down the canyon wall creating white mist
deep canyon with river flowing through it visible far below
small buildings or ruins visible on the distant canyon rim
large flying creatures or vehicles soaring in the sky above the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from vegetation onto a dramatic cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking vista of a massive waterfall and deep canyon below. Flying creatures soar in the sky near distant structures, while the large pink planet remains visible above the rugged landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a red rock canyon up to a sweeping cliffside vista. It begins with the character wading through a clear, reflective shallow river flanked by towering red walls under a sky dominated by a large pink planet. As the character leaves the water, the scene shifts toward a vegetated bank, moving through dense alien bushes and aloe plants as the canyon walls gradually recede. The camera then follows the path through the thick greenery before emerging onto a dramatic cliff edge. This final transition reveals a breathtaking expanse of a deep canyon and a massive waterfall, with flying creatures soaring near distant structures beneath the persistent glow of the pink planet.
